curation_notes: Patch modifies a single file (drivers/adodb-postgres64.inc.php) in the pg_insert_id() function. The fix adds pg_escape_identifier() to properly escape the $tablename and $fieldname parameters before concatenating them into the SQL query. Sibling postgres drivers (postgres7, postgres8, postgres9) inherit pg_insert_id() from postgres64 via class inheritance and do not override it, so only the base class file is listed as a location. Vulnerability class sql-injection confirmed from CWE-89, advisory description, and patch diff.
